<div class="col-md-3 article-toc d-none d-md-block">
= Contents =
  - [[#Python Beautiful Soup|Python Beautiful Soup]]
    - [[#Python Beautiful Soup#安装|安装]]
      - [[#Python Beautiful Soup#安装#安装BS4|安装BS4]]
      - [[#Python Beautiful Soup#安装#安装解析器|安装解析器]]
      - [[#Python Beautiful Soup#安装#中文文档|中文文档]]

</div>
<div class="col-md-9 article-main">
%template article_template
=Python Beautiful Soup=

== 安装==
===安装BS4===

在apt中叫 python-bs4, pip中叫beautifulsoup4. 

===安装解析器===

在apt中叫Python-lxml, 在pip中叫lxml.

===中文文档===

https://www.crummy.com/software/BeautifulSoup/bs4/doc/index.zh.html



{{{
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup

soup = BeautifulSoup(open("index.html"))

soup = BeautifulSoup("<html>data</html>")
}}}
所有对象可以归纳为4种: Tag , NavigableString , BeautifulSoup , Comment .
